scripts.eval:far: npx --yes tsx -e "const { measureFar, formatFarPercent } = require('./lib/eval/measureFar.ts'); const r = measureFar(); console.log('Price FAR', formatFarPercent(r.price.falseAlarmRate), 'recall', formatFarPercent(r.price.recall)); console.log('Scam  FAR', formatFarPercent(r.scam.falseAlarmRate), 'recall', formatFarPercent(r.scam.recall)); console.log('Overall FAR', formatFarPercent(r.overall.falseAlarmRate), 'on', r.overall.cases, 'fixtures'); if (r.failures.length) { console.log('Failures', r.failures); process.exitCode = 1; }"
scripts.test: npm run eval:far && npm run smoke
